author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat: allow users to override classes with `class-names` prop (algolia/vue-instantsearch#520)
body:
* chore: make suit mixin completely responsible of classes

* chore: prettier

* docs: expand on some stories

* feat(suit): accept `class-name` everywhere

* docs: add note on class-names

* docs: add class-names everywhere

* refactor(HM): revert move from props to mixin

* chore: remove useless story

* feat(css): add the users' class as well as original

* chore: fix fucking prettier

* fix: deal correctly with array return!

* fix: string > array!
